docs.title: Incident Reporting Procedure
docs.reporting_timeframes: Confirmed incidents are reported to US-CERT within 1 hour of determination, to the Authorizing Official and FedRAMP ISSO within 1 hour, and status updates are provided at least daily until closure; suspected incidents are internally reported within 30 minutes of detection.
docs.authorities_notified: US-CERT/CISA (primary federal authority), the Authorizing Official (AO), the FedRAMP PMO/ISSO, and, where personal data is involved, affected agency customers per their contracts.
docs.escalation_path: On-call responder -> Incident Commander -> CISO -> AO and FedRAMP ISSO; the CISO or delegate is the designated reporter to US-CERT and confirms submission of the report ticket.
